comments.author: @dougdevoz6611
comments.text: Beautiful aerial footage of the beautiful Faroe Islands is very well done but the monotonous ai speak with it's metaphors drives me insane as well as the repetition of scenes over and over. Would have been better and more impact if you asked a Faroese  to narrate in their own tongue with cc or in english which most speak rather than english ai.voice which spoiled the film. The Faroese are wonderful people with their distinct culture in their beautiful part of the world. Try the fermented lamb and their amazing fish meals.
